title: Why Prince George wore suit at Wimbledon, even in the heat
summary_full: Prince George and Prince William attended the Wimbledon men's final in formal attire. They adhered to the Royal Box dress code, which mandates suits and ties. Despite the heat, this strict protocol was followed by the royal attendees. Children are rarely permitted in the exclusive Royal Box seating area. However, Prince George and Princess Charlotte were exceptions to this unwritten rule.
